_meta.description: Machine-readable conformance test suite for any implementation of the RIO protocol. Contains the 57 test definitions, 8 protocol invariants, cryptographic constants, hash computation formulas, signing payload contract, and ledger chain formula. An implementation passes conformance if it reproduces all hashes and verifies all signatures using the test vectors in tests/vectors/.

conformance_levels.level_1: Receipt Format — static hash/signature/field checks, no pipeline required
conformance_levels.level_2: Pipeline — governance pipeline, gate enforcement, ledger chain
conformance_levels.level_3: Full Protocol — adapter layer, AI routing, multi-tool governance

protocol_invariants.INV-01: Human Authority Preserved — no autonomous execution without explicit human authorization
protocol_invariants.INV-02: All Decisions Logged — every governance decision produces a verifiable audit record
protocol_invariants.INV-03: Policy Compliance — requests must not violate declared coherence/somatic thresholds
protocol_invariants.INV-04: Scope Integrity — response scope must match stated intent; no unexpanded execution
protocol_invariants.INV-05: Tool Permission Enforcement — any tool usage must be within declared agent permissions
protocol_invariants.INV-06: Cryptographic Integrity — receipts must be signed; signatures must be verifiable
protocol_invariants.INV-07: Ledger Append-Only — the governance ledger must form a valid hash chain from genesis
protocol_invariants.INV-08: Fail-Closed Default — when evaluation fails or is ambiguous, the system must deny

cryptographic_constants.test_key_note: DEDICATED TEST KEY — deterministic from SHA256(b'RIO_CONFORMANCE_TEST_SEED_v1'). Never use in production.

canonicalisation_contract.note: Every nested object must also have sorted keys. No trailing whitespace. No newlines.

signing_payload_contract.description: The Ed25519 signature is over canonical_json of exactly these 19 fields in this order:
signing_payload_contract.construction: signing_bytes = canonical_json({k: receipt[k] for k in SIGNED_FIELDS_ORDER})
signing_payload_contract.receipt_hash_note: receipt_hash and signature are NOT included in the signing payload — they are computed from it
signing_payload_contract.pem_parsing: Strip PEM header/footer → base64-decode DER → take bytes[12:] as raw 32-byte Ed25519 public key

ledger_chain_contract.append_note: String concatenation first, then encode to UTF-8 — NOT byte XOR or separate hashes

decision_types.allow: All invariants pass, thresholds in range, no adversarial keywords
decision_types.modify: Scope mismatch or coherence below threshold — execution narrowed to stated parameters only
decision_types.block: Authority escalation detected (INV-01) or user disengaged
decision_types.escalate: Somatic score above safe band — second witness or human pause required

test_cases.title: Clean Pass Through Full Governance Pipeline
User Disengagement Kill Switch
test_cases.note: disengage=True unconditionally blocks regardless of intent content

test_cases.title: Tool with needs_approval=True Requires Approval Token
Invalid or Fake Approval Token Rejected
Ledger Append Produces Valid Chain Entry
Tool Outside Agent Permitted List Rejected
Human Signature Required for needs_approval Tools
Clean Intent Passes All Corpus Checks
Admin Token Required for Policy Modification
Public Policy Endpoint Does Not Expose Secrets
Policy Bundle Hash in Receipt Matches Reference
Missing Fields Detected by Required-Fields Check

hash_computation_examples.json.description: 7 worked hash examples — same inputs MUST produce same outputs

signing_payload_examples.json.description: 3 signing examples — all 3 signatures verifiable with public_key.pem

interoperability_bar.description: Minimum 4 conditions for claiming RIO Receipt Interoperability
interoperability_bar.condition_1: Reproduce all hashes in hash_computation_examples.json from same inputs
interoperability_bar.condition_2: Verify all 3 signatures in signing_payload_examples.json with public_key.pem
interoperability_bar.condition_3: All invalid vectors return FAIL; all valid vectors return PASS

hash_examples.description: SHA256 of canonical JSON of the request_canonical_payload object
SHA256 of canonical JSON of the signed_payload (19 fields, excluding receipt_hash and signature)
hash_examples.note: The signed_payload object contains exactly: receipt_version, receipt_id, timestamp, runtime_id, runtime_version, environment, request_summary, request_hash, request_canonical_payload, policy_bundle_id, policy_bundle_hash, decision, decision_reason_codes, invariant_results, threshold_results, model_output_hash, model_output_preview, prev_ledger_hash, public_key_fingerprint

hash_examples.description: SHA256 of canonical JSON of the POLICY_BUNDLE object
SHA256 of (prev_ledger_hash + receipt_hash).encode('utf-8') — string concatenation then UTF-8 encode
SHA256 of the literal bytes b'GENESIS' — the starting point of every ledger chain
SHA256 of model_output string encoded as UTF-8 bytes
hash_examples.input_string: Intent evaluated and approved. Proceeding with: Please summarize the quarterly financial report for internal review.

hash_examples.description: SHA256 of the raw 32-byte Ed25519 public key bytes (not PEM, not DER — raw key bytes)
